records.question: What clubs named AIK are in the USA region with a male coach named Jameson Tomas, having at most rank 1, exactly 20 gold medals, at least 9 small silver medals, and at least 168 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE club.region = 'USA' AND coach.coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas' AND match_result.rank <= 1 AND club.club_name = 'AIK' AND match_result.small_silver >= 9 AND coach.gender = 'M' AND match_result.gold = 20 AND match_result.points >= 168
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Club_ID FROM club AS T1 INNER JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID = T2.Club_ID INNER JOIN match_result AS T3 ON T1.Club_ID = T3.Club_ID WHERE T1.Club_name = 'AIK' AND T1.Region = 'USA' AND T2.Coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas' AND T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T2.Rank <= 1 AND T3.Gold = 20 AND T3.Small_Silver >= 9 AND T3.Points >= 168

records.question: Which clubs coached by Jameson Tomas have at least 14 big silver medals but no more than 8 bronze medals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.big_silver >= 14 AND match_result.bronze <= 8 AND coach.coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Club_ID FROM club AS T1 INNER JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID = T2.Club_ID INNER JOIN match_result AS T3 ON T1.Club_ID = T3.Club_ID WHERE T2.Coach_name = 'Jameson Tomas' AND T3.Big_Silver >= 14 AND T3.Bronze <= 8

records.question: Which clubs have at least one related coach and have match results where the number of big silver medals won is at most 9 and the number of gold medals won is exactly 12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN coach ON club.club_id = coach.club_id
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.big_silver <= 9 AND match_result.gold = 12
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Club_ID FROM club AS T1 INNER JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID = T2.Club_ID INNER JOIN match_result AS T3 ON T1.Club_ID = T3.Club_ID WHERE T3.Big_Silver <= 9 AND T3.Gold = 12

records.question: Which clubs have exactly 12 big silver, at least 10 small silver, and at least 89 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN match_result ON club.club_id = match_result.club_id
WHERE match_result.big_silver = 12 AND match_result.small_silver >= 10 AND match_result.points >= 89
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Club_ID FROM club AS T1 INNER JOIN match_result AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID = T2.Club_ID WHERE T2.Big_Silver = 12 AND T2.Small_Silver >= 10 AND T2.Points >= 89
